    32	          .reject { |path| File.basename(path).start_with?("PaxHeaders") }
    33	
    34	      if upload_directories.count > 1
    35	        raise UploadsRestoreError.new(
    36	                "Could not find uploads, because the uploads " \

    38	              )
    39	      end

    41	      @tmp_uploads_path = upload_directories.first
    42	      return if @tmp_uploads_path.blank?

    89	      log "Remapping uploads..."
    90

    92	      upload_path = "/#{Discourse.store.upload_path}/"
    93	      uploads_folder = was_multisite ? "/" : upload_path

    96	        remap(old_base_url, Discourse.base_url)

   108	      if (old_s3_cdn_url = BackupMetadata.value_for("s3_cdn_url")) &&
   109	           old_s3_cdn_url != current_s3_cdn_url
   110	        base_url = current_s3_cdn_url || Discourse.base_url
   111	        remap("#{old_s3_cdn_url}/", UrlHelper.schemaless("#{base_url}#{uploads_folder}"))

   149	      end

     2	require "aws-sdk-mediaconvert"
     3	
     4	module VideoConversion
     5	  class AwsMediaConvertAdapter < BaseAdapter
     6	    ADAPTER_NAME = "aws_mediaconvert"
     7	
     8	    def convert
     9	      return false if !valid_settings?
    10	
    11	      begin
    12	        new_sha1 = SecureRandom.hex(20)
    13	
    14	        # Extract the path from the URL
    15	        # The URL format is: //bucket.s3.dualstack.region.amazonaws.com/path/to/file
    16	        # or: //bucket.s3.region.amazonaws.com/path/to/file
    17	        url = @upload.url.sub(%r{^//}, "") # Remove leading //
    18	
    19	        # Split on the first / to separate the domain from the path
    20	        domain, path = url.split("/", 2)
    21	
    22	        # Verify the domain contains our bucket
    23	        if !domain&.include?(s3_upload_bucket)
    24	          raise Discourse::InvalidParameters.new(
    25	                  "Upload URL domain for upload ID #{@upload.id} does not contain expected bucket name: #{s3_upload_bucket}",
    26	                )
    27	        end
    28	
    29	        input_path = "s3://#{s3_upload_bucket}/#{path}"
    30	
    31	        settings = build_conversion_settings(input_path, new_sha1)
    32	
    33	        begin
    34	          response =
    35	            mediaconvert_client.create_job(
    36	              role: SiteSetting.mediaconvert_role_arn,
    37	              settings: settings,
    38	              status_update_interval: "SECONDS_10",
    39	              user_metadata: {
    40	                "upload_id" => @upload.id.to_s,
    41	                "new_sha1" => new_sha1,
    42	              },
    43	            )
    44	
    45	          # Enqueue status check job
    46	          Jobs.enqueue_in(
    47	            30.seconds,
    48	            :check_video_conversion_status,
    49	            upload_id: @upload.id,
    50	            job_id: response.job.id,
    51	            new_sha1: new_sha1,
    52	            original_filename: @upload.original_filename,
    53	            user_id: @upload.user_id,
    54	            adapter_type: "aws_mediaconvert",
    55	          )
    56	
    57	          true # Return true on success
    58	        rescue Aws::MediaConvert::Errors::ServiceError => e
    59	          Discourse.warn_exception(
    60	            e,
    61	            message: "MediaConvert job creation failed",
    62	            env: {
    63	              upload_id: @upload.id,
    64	            },
    65	          )
    66	          false
    67	        rescue => e
    68	          Discourse.warn_exception(
    69	            e,
    70	            message: "Unexpected error in MediaConvert job creation",
    71	            env: {
    72	              upload_id: @upload.id,
    73	            },
    74	          )
    75	          false
    76	        end
    77	      rescue Discourse::InvalidParameters => e
    78	        Rails.logger.error("Invalid parameters for upload #{@upload.id}: #{e.message}")
    79	        false
    80	      rescue => e
    81	        Discourse.warn_exception(
    82	          e,
    83	          message: "Unexpected error in video conversion",
    84	          env: {
    85	            upload_id: @upload.id,
    86	          },
    87	        )
    88	        false
    89	      end
    90	    end
    91	
    92	    def check_status(job_id)
    93	      response = mediaconvert_client.get_job(id: job_id)
    94	
    95	      case response.job.status
    96	      when "COMPLETE"
    97	        STATUS_COMPLETE
    98	      when "ERROR"
    99	        Rails.logger.error(
   100	          "MediaConvert job #{job_id} failed. Error Code: #{response.job.error_code}, " \
   101	            "Error Message: #{response.job.error_message}, Upload ID: #{@upload.id}",
   102	        )
   103	        STATUS_ERROR
   104	      when "SUBMITTED", "PROGRESSING"
   105	        STATUS_PENDING
   106	      else
   107	        Rails.logger.warn(
   108	          "Unexpected MediaConvert job status for job #{job_id}: #{response.job.status}",
   109	        )
   110	        STATUS_ERROR
   111	      end
   112	    end
   113	
   114	    def handle_completion(job_id, new_sha1)
   115	      s3_store = FileStore::S3Store.new
   116	      temp_path = File.join(SiteSetting.mediaconvert_output_subdirectory, "#{new_sha1}.mp4")
   117	
   118	      temp_object = find_temp_file(s3_store, temp_path)
   119	      return false if !temp_object
   120	
   121	      begin
   122	        filesize = temp_object.size
   123	        final_path = get_final_upload_path(new_sha1)
   124	        destination_path, etag = copy_file_to_final_location(s3_store, temp_path, final_path)
   125	        return false if !destination_path
   126	
   127	        update_file_acl(s3_store, destination_path)
   128	        remove_temp_file(s3_store, temp_path)
   129	
   130	        url = build_file_url(s3_store, destination_path)
   131	        output_path = get_output_path_for_record(final_path)
   132	        optimized_video =
   133	          create_optimized_video_record(output_path, new_sha1, filesize, url, etag: etag)
   134	
   135	        if optimized_video
   136	          update_posts_with_optimized_video(optimized_video)
   137	          true
   138	        else
   139	          Rails.logger.error("Failed to create OptimizedVideo record for upload #{@upload.id}")
   140	          false
   176	    def get_final_upload_path(new_sha1)
   177	      temp_upload = build_temp_upload_for_path_generation(new_sha1)
   178	      Discourse.store.get_path_for_upload(temp_upload)
   179	    end
   180	
   181	    def copy_file_to_final_location(s3_store, temp_path, final_path)
   182	      s3_helper = s3_store.s3_helper
   183	
   184	      destination_path = get_s3_path(final_path)
   185	
   186	      copy_options = s3_store.default_s3_options(secure: @upload.secure?)
   187	
   188	      begin
   189	        destination_path, etag = s3_helper.copy(temp_path, destination_path, options: copy_options)
   190	
   191	        destination_object = s3_helper.object(destination_path)
   192	        if !destination_object.exists?
   193	          Rails.logger.error(
   194	            "MediaConvert copy completed but destination file not found at #{destination_path} for upload #{@upload.id}",
   195	          )
   196	          [nil, nil]
   197	        end
   198	
   199	        # Log ACL settings for debugging
   200	        if copy_options[:acl].present?
   201	          Rails.logger.debug(
   202	            "MediaConvert copied file with ACL: #{copy_options[:acl]} (secure: #{@upload.secure?}) for upload #{@upload.id}",
   203	          )
   204	        end
   205	
   206	        [destination_path, etag]
   207	      rescue Aws::S3::Errors::NotFound => e
   208	        Rails.logger.error(
   209	          "MediaConvert copy failed - source or destination not found: #{e.message} (source: #{temp_path}, destination: #{destination_path}) for upload #{@upload.id}",
   210	        )
   211	        [nil, nil]
   212	      rescue Aws::S3::Errors::AccessDenied, Aws::S3::Errors::Forbidden => e
   213	        # Copy failed due to permissions - this is critical
   214	        Discourse.warn_exception(
   215	          e,
   216	          message: "MediaConvert copy failed due to permissions - ACL may not be applied",
   217	          env: {
   218	            upload_id: @upload.id,
   219	            temp_path: temp_path,
   220	            destination_path: destination_path,
   221	            secure: @upload.secure?,
   222	            copy_options: copy_options,
   223	          },
   224	        )
   225	        raise
   226	      rescue => e
   227	        Rails.logger.error(
   228	          "MediaConvert copy failed: #{e.class.name} - #{e.message} (source: #{temp_path}, destination: #{destination_path}) for upload #{@upload.id}",
   229	        )
   230	        raise
   231	      end
   232	    end
   233	
   234	    def update_file_acl(s3_store, destination_path)
   235	      begin
   236	        s3_store.update_file_access_control(destination_path, @upload.secure?)
   237	      rescue Aws::S3::Errors::NotFound => e
   238	        Rails.logger.error(
   239	          "MediaConvert file not found when updating access control at #{destination_path} for upload #{@upload.id}: #{e.message}",
   240	        )
   241	        raise
   242	      rescue Aws::S3::Errors::AccessDenied, Aws::S3::Errors::Forbidden => e
   243	        # ACL update failed due to permissions - this is critical as it will cause 403s
   244	        Discourse.warn_exception(
   245	          e,
   246	          message: "MediaConvert ACL update failed due to permissions - file may be inaccessible",
   247	          env: {
   248	            upload_id: @upload.id,
   249	            destination_path: destination_path,
   250	            secure: @upload.secure?,
   251	          },
   252	        )
   253	        raise
   254	      rescue Aws::S3::Errors::ServiceError => e
   255	        # Catch other AWS S3 errors that might prevent ACL from being set
   256	        Discourse.warn_exception(
   257	          e,
   258	          message: "MediaConvert ACL update failed with AWS error",
   259	          env: {
   260	            upload_id: @upload.id,
   261	            destination_path: destination_path,
   262	            secure: @upload.secure?,
   263	            error_code: e.code,
   264	          },
   265	        )
   266	        raise
   267	      end
   268	    end
   269	
   270	    def remove_temp_file(s3_store, temp_path)
   271	      s3_helper = s3_store.s3_helper
   272	      begin
   273	        s3_helper.remove(temp_path, false)
   274	      rescue => e
   275	        # Log but don't fail if deletion fails - file will be cleaned up later
   276	        Rails.logger.warn("Failed to delete temporary MediaConvert file #{temp_path}: #{e.message}")
   277	      end
   278	    end
   279	
   280	    def build_file_url(s3_store, destination_path)
   281	      # Ensure path has leading slash for URL
   282	      path_with_slash =
   283	        destination_path.start_with?("/") ? destination_path : "/#{destination_path}"
   284	      # Use s3_store.absolute_base_url which handles dualstack, region, and custom endpoints
   285	      "#{s3_store.absolute_base_url}#{path_with_slash}"
   286	    end
   287	
   288	    def get_output_path_for_record(final_path)
   289	      # Remove .mp4 extension for the record path
   290	      get_s3_path(final_path).sub(/\.mp4$/, "")
   291	    end
   292	
   293	    def get_s3_path(path)
   294	      return path if path.blank?
   295	
   296	      if Rails.configuration.multisite
   297	        multisite_prefix = build_multisite_path
   298	        # Prevent double-prepending if path already includes the multisite prefix
   299	        return path if path.start_with?(multisite_prefix)
   300	        File.join(multisite_prefix, path)
   301	      else
   302	        path
   303	      end
   304	    end
   305	
   306	    def build_multisite_path
   307	      path = File.join("uploads", RailsMultisite::ConnectionManagement.current_db)
   308	      "#{path}/"
   309	    end
   310	
   311	    def build_temp_upload_for_path_generation(new_sha1)
   312	      # Create a temporary upload object to leverage FileStore::BaseStore path generation
   313	      # This object is only used for path generation and won't be saved to the database
   314	      Upload.new(
   315	        id: @upload.id, # Use the same ID to get the same depth calculation
   316	        sha1: new_sha1,
   317	        extension: "mp4",
   318	      )
   319	    end
   320	
   321	    def mediaconvert_client
   322	      @mediaconvert_client ||= build_client
   323	    end

    95	  def initialize(external_upload_stub, upload_create_opts = {})
    96	    @external_upload_stub = external_upload_stub
    97	    @upload_create_opts = upload_create_opts
    98	    @store = ExternalUploadManager.store_for_upload_type(external_upload_stub.upload_type)

   101	  def can_promote?
   102	    external_upload_stub.status == ExternalUploadStub.statuses[:created]
   103	  end
   104	
   105	  def transform!
   106	    raise CannotPromoteError if !can_promote?
   107	    external_upload_stub.update!(status: ExternalUploadStub.statuses[:uploaded])
   108	
   109	    # We require that the file size is specified ahead of time, and compare
   110	    # it here to make sure that people are not uploading excessively large
   111	    # files to the external provider. If this happens, the user will be banned
   112	    # from uploading to the external provider for N minutes.
   113	    if external_size != external_upload_stub.filesize
   114	      ExternalUploadManager.ban_user_from_external_uploads!(
   115	        user: external_upload_stub.created_by,
   116	        ban_minutes: SIZE_MISMATCH_BAN_MINUTES,
   117	      )
   118	      raise SizeMismatchError.new(
   119	              "expected: #{external_upload_stub.filesize}, actual: #{external_size}",
   120	            )
   121	    end
   122	
   123	    if UPLOAD_TYPES_EXCLUDED_FROM_UPLOAD_PROMOTION.include?(external_upload_stub.upload_type)
   124	      move_to_final_destination
   125	    else
   126	      promote_to_upload
   127	    end
   128	  rescue StandardError
   129	    if !SiteSetting.enable_upload_debug_mode
   130	      # We don't need to do anything special to abort multipart uploads here,
   131	      # because at this point (calling promote_to_upload!), the multipart
   132	      # upload would already be complete.
   133	      @store.delete_file(external_upload_stub.key)
   134	      external_upload_stub.destroy!
   135	    else
   136	      external_upload_stub.update(status: ExternalUploadStub.statuses[:failed])
   137	    end
   138	
   139	    raise
   140	  end
   141	
   142	  private
   143	
   144	  def promote_to_upload
   145	    # This could be legitimately nil, if it's too big to download on the
   146	    # server, or it could have failed. To this end we set a should_download
   147	    # variable as well to check.
   148	    tempfile = nil
   149	    should_download = external_size < DOWNLOAD_LIMIT
   150	
   151	    if should_download
   152	      tempfile = download(external_upload_stub.key, external_upload_stub.upload_type)
   153	
   154	      raise DownloadFailedError if tempfile.blank?
   155	
   156	      actual_sha1 = Upload.generate_digest(tempfile)
   157	      raise ChecksumMismatchError if external_sha1 && external_sha1 != actual_sha1
   158	    end
   159	
   160	    opts = {
   161	      type: external_upload_stub.upload_type,
   162	      existing_external_upload_key: external_upload_stub.key,
   163	      external_upload_too_big: external_size > DOWNLOAD_LIMIT,
   164	      filesize: external_size,
   165	    }.merge(@upload_create_opts)
   166	
   167	    UploadCreator.new(tempfile, external_upload_stub.original_filename, opts).create_for(
   168	      external_upload_stub.created_by_id,
   169	    )
   170	  ensure
   171	    tempfile&.close!
   172	  end

   175	    content_type =

   177	        "application/gzip"
   178	    @store.move_existing_stored_upload(
   179	      existing_external_upload_key: external_upload_stub.key,
   180	      original_filename: external_upload_stub.original_filename,
   181	      content_type: content_type,
   182	    )
   183	    Struct.new(:errors).new([])
   184	  end

     3	class HandleChunkUpload
     4	  def initialize(chunk, params = {})
     5	    @chunk = chunk
     6	    @params = params
     7	  end
     8	
     9	  def self.check_chunk(chunk, params)
    10	    HandleChunkUpload.new(chunk, params).check_chunk
    11	  end
    12	
    13	  def self.upload_chunk(chunk, params)
    14	    HandleChunkUpload.new(chunk, params).upload_chunk
    15	  end
    16	
    17	  def self.merge_chunks(chunk, params)
    18	    HandleChunkUpload.new(chunk, params).merge_chunks
    19	  end
    20	
    21	  def check_chunk
    22	    # check whether the chunk has already been uploaded
    23	    has_chunk_been_uploaded =
    24	      File.exist?(@chunk) && File.size(@chunk) == @params[:current_chunk_size]
    25	    # 200 = exists, 404 = not uploaded yet
    26	    has_chunk_been_uploaded ? 200 : 404
    27	  end
    28	
    29	  def upload_chunk
    30	    # path to chunk file
    31	    dir = File.dirname(@chunk)
    32	    # ensure directory exists
    33	    FileUtils.mkdir_p(dir) unless Dir.exist?(dir)
    34	    # save chunk to the directory
    35	    File.open(@chunk, "wb") { |f| f.write(@params[:file].tempfile.read) }
    36	  end
    37	
    38	  def merge_chunks
    39	    upload_path = @params[:upload_path]
    40	    tmp_upload_path = @params[:tmp_upload_path]
    41	    identifier = @params[:identifier]
    42	    filename = @params[:filename]
    43	    tmp_directory = @params[:tmp_directory]
    44	
    45	    # delete destination files
    46	    begin
    47	      File.delete(upload_path)
    48	      File.delete(tmp_upload_path)
    49	    rescue Errno::ENOENT
    50	    end
    51	
    52	    # merge all the chunks
    53	    File.open(tmp_upload_path, "a") do |file|
    54	      (1..@chunk).each do |chunk_number|
    55	        # path to chunk
    56	        chunk_path = BackupRestore::LocalBackupStore.chunk_path(identifier, filename, chunk_number)
    57	        # add chunk to file
    58	        file << File.open(chunk_path).read
    59	      end
    60	    end
    61	
    62	    # rename tmp file to final file name
    63	    FileUtils.mv(tmp_upload_path, upload_path, force: true)
    64	
    65	    # remove tmp directory
    66	    begin
    67	      FileUtils.rm_rf(tmp_directory)
    68	    rescue Errno::ENOENT
    69	    end
    70	  end
    71	end

    20	  def fetch_svg(upload:)
    21	    content =
    22	      begin
    23	        upload.content
    24	      rescue StandardError
    25	        nil
    26	      end
    27	
    28	    return nil if content.blank?
    29	
    30	    Nokogiri.XML(content).at_css("svg")

    33	  def fetch_cleaned_svg(svg:)
    34	    # Disables SMIL animations which can cause performance issues,
    35	    # CSS animations are preferred.
    36	    svg.xpath(
    37	      ".//*[local-name()='animate' or local-name()='animateTransform' or local-name()='animateMotion' or local-name()='set']",
    38	    ).each(&:remove)
    39	
    40	    # Remove explicit dimensions so the SVG scales via viewBox
    41	    if svg["viewBox"].present?
    42	      svg.remove_attribute("width")
    43	      svg.remove_attribute("height")
    44	    end
    45	
    46	    svg.to_xml
    47	  end
    48	
    49	  def save_cleaned_svg_upload(cleaned_svg:, upload:)
    50	    return if cleaned_svg == upload.content
    51	
    52	    Tempfile.open(%w[splash_screen .svg]) do |tmp|
    53	      tmp.write(cleaned_svg)
    54	      tmp.rewind
    55	
    56	      new_sha1 = Upload.generate_digest(tmp.path)
    57	      existing = Upload.find_by(sha1: new_sha1)
    58	
    59	      if existing && existing.id != upload.id
    60	        SiteSetting.splash_screen_image = existing.id
    61	      else
    62	        old_path = Discourse.store.get_path_for_upload(upload)
    63	        old_url = upload.url
    64	        upload.tap do |u|
    65	          u.sha1 = new_sha1
    66	          u.filesize = tmp.size
    67	          u.url = Discourse.store.store_upload(tmp, u)
    68	          u.save!(validate: false)
    69	        end
    70	
    71	        Discourse.store.remove_file(old_url, old_path) if upload.url != old_url
    72	      end
    73	    end
    74	  end
    75	
    76	  def clear_cache(upload:)
    77	    Discourse.cache.delete("splash_screen_svg_#{upload.id}_#{upload.sha1}")
    78	  end
    79	end

  1373	  def hydrate_uploads_in_object(object, properties, uploads_by_id)
  1374	    properties.each do |prop_key, prop_value|
  1375	      case prop_value[:type]
  1376	      when "upload"

  1378	        upload_id = object[key]
  1379	        upload = uploads_by_id[upload_id]
  1380	        object[key] = upload.url if upload
  1381	      when "objects"
  1382	        nested_objects = object[prop_key.to_s]
  1383	        if nested_objects.is_a?(Array)
  1384	          nested_objects.each do |nested_obj|
  1385	            hydrate_uploads_in_object(nested_obj, prop_value[:schema][:properties], uploads_by_id)
